intro_highlights.text: However , artifacts are often observed in the estimated depth map, e.g., depth values for points located in the same region may jump dramatically.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: To address this issue, we propose a novel selfsupervised monocular depth estimation framework called GeoDepth, where we explore the intrinsic geometric representation in 3D scenes for producing accurate and continuous depth maps.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: In particular , we model the complex 3D scene as a collection of planes with varying sizes, where each plane is characterized by a unique set of parameters, namely planar normal (indicating plane orientation) and planar offset (deﬁning the perpendicular distance from the camera center to the plane).
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
